prompt: A warm, shallow-depth-of-field autumn photograph of multiple fallen maple leaves scattered across dark asphalt pavement in bright golden sunlight. The leaves are mostly yellow, orange, and amber, with one prominent vivid orange leaf in the left foreground and several yellow leaves stretching diagonally into the distance. The camera is low to the ground, close-up, with crisp focus on the central foreground leaves and soft bokeh blur in the background and extreme foreground. Across the middle of the image, overlay large delicate handwritten Japanese text in white, thin brush-pen style, slightly irregular and emotional, reading 今日も、寒いね。. Natural outdoor lighting, cozy seasonal mood, realistic textures, high contrast between sunlit leaves and rough pavement, square composition, poetic social-media aesthetic.
